title: New Strong Sell Stocks for July 31st
text: CBRE, CZWI and DG have been added to the Zacks Rank #5 (Strong Sell) List on July 31, 2023.

title: Is It Time to Buy the S&P 500's 4 Worst-Performing Stocks?
text: Advance Auto Parts is by far the worst performer on the broad-market index. KeyBank has gotten tripped up by the regional banking crisis.

title: Better Buy: Foot Locker vs. Dollar General Stock
text: Dollar General has a clearer path toward rebounding growth. Foot Locker is likely to see more pressure from price cuts throughout 2023.

title: Is Dollar General a Buy Now?
text: The discount store chain cut its 2023 sales and earnings forecast. While It's been raising dividends, free cash flow hasn't been enough to cover them.

title: Dollar General Puts ‘Food First' Through Investment in Private Brands
text: GOODLETTSVILLE, Tenn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Dollar General Puts ‘Food First' Through Investment in Private Brands.

title: Is The Thrill Of Victory Worth The Agony Of Defeat?
text: I began writing on Seeking Alpha because I enjoy writing and because it provided me with an opportunity to share investing ideas and strategies with other like-minded investors. Today I want to continue with my “lessons learned” series. Now, whenever I decide to invest in a stock, business, or direct real estate, I always ask myself “is the thrill of victory worth the agony of defeat?"

title: Dollar General Stock Has Had a Major Achievement in 8 of the Past 10 Years
text: Dollar General stock has consistently beaten the markets. It has normally generated positive year-over-year growth.

title: 2 Dividend Stocks That Could Help Recession-Proof Your Portfolio
text: PepsiCo and Dollar General both do just fine when consumer budgets are tight. Each company pays a safe and growing dividend to shareholders.

title: Dollar General Helps Build Success in the Classroom with Back-to-School Savings
text: GOODLETTSVILLE, Tenn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Dollar General Helps Build Success in the Classroom with Back-to-School Savings.

title: Dollar General Seeks Diverse Suppliers
text: GOODLETTSVILLE, Tenn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Dollar General today announced a call for diverse suppliers, reflecting its goal to remove or mitigate unintended barriers for diverse suppliers and help increase the representation of these groups in the communities it serves. Applications to apply are currently open online at http://www.rangeme.com/dgdiversity23 through end of day on August 7, 2023, and virtual meetings with Dollar General's supplier diversity team will be held from September 25-29, 202.

title: Underperforming Discount Retailer for Options Bears
text: Subscribers to Schaeffer's Weekend Trader options recommendation service received this DG commentary on Sunday night, along with a detailed options trade recommendation -- including complete entry and exit parameters.

title: Dollar General has paid a fraction of the $21 million it owes in fines for hazardous working conditions
text: Dollar General has paid less than one-fifth of the $21 million in fines it owes OSHA. The retailer has accumulated the fines over several years due to messy and chaotic stores.

title: Dollar General: Looking Cheap Using DCF And Comparables
text: Dollar General's share prices fell by 25% and are trading at a discount according to analysis using comparables and discounted cash flow valuation tools. Despite macroeconomic headwinds and reduced forecasts for FY2023, DG's management is taking steps to recover. DG is currently trading at a discount to peers and its own historical valuation averages, with a potential upside of 30% according to a Cash Flow Returns on Investments based DCF valuation model.

title: Better Buy: Dollar General vs. Ulta Beauty
text: The stocks are underperforming in 2023. Ulta Beauty will likely appeal more to growth stock investors.

title: Should Investors Buy Dollar General Stock for the Dividend?
text: Dollar General's stock valuation is near 10-year lows. The dividend has risen every year since its reintroduction in 2015.

title: Better Buy: Dollar General vs. Walmart
text: Dollar General's small-store format coupled with its large number of stores is proving a logistical headache. Walmart's sheer size and brick-and-mortar infrastructure allow it to handle merchandise more effectively.

title: Best Dividend Stocks to Buy: Dollar General vs. Advance Auto Parts
text: These dividend stocks could perform better during a recession.

title: Dollar General Extends Feeding America® Partnership
text: GOODLETTSVILLE, Tenn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Dollar General Extends Feeding America® Partnership.

title: Dollar General: Buy On Rare Pullback
text: Dollar General checks a lot of boxes that smell like a deal to me. The main two troubling items are the capital expenditures well in excess of depreciation and amortization and the negative free cash flow. The high return on invested capital is a big plus for me, but decreasing margin trends in the past 3 years offset some of that excitement.

title: Why Dollar General Shares Tumbled 31% in the First Half of 2023
text: Years of understaffing and poor inventory management are finally catching up with the low-price retailer. Management, however, is working to address both issues.

title: What's Wrong With Dollar General Stock?
text: Dollar General is growing sales slower than competitors like Family Dollar. Shares are down because of fears over margin compression in the coming quarters and years.

title: 3 Cheap Blue-Chip Stocks to Buy Before They Bounce Back
text: The stock market had a tremendous start to 2023. It might leave investors wondering what cheap blue-chip stocks are left to buy at reasonable prices.

title: 4 Stocks That Moved the Market in June
text: Travel stocks were some of the market's best performers. Home building, housing supplies, and materials stocks all reacted to Fed commentary and economic data.

title: Where Will Dollar General Stock Be in 5 Years?
text: The discount retailer is struggling to manage its thousands of small-footprint locations. Dollar General, however, is addressing its two biggest headaches -- inventory and staffing.

title: Is It Time to Buy the S&P 500's 3 Worst-Performing Stocks in June?
text: Some of the discount retailer Dollar General's operational flaws were exposed coming out of the pandemic. Health insurer Humana says its costs came in higher than expected, but it's been in this situation before and can resolve it.

title: Why Dollar General Stock Dropped in June
text: Sales are under pressure as consumers pull back on spending. Dollar General remains highly profitable.

title: My Top 15 High Growth Dividend Stocks For July 2023
text: The watchlist from June posted a gain of 8.91% last month, outperforming the SPDR S&P 500 Trust ETF by 2.43% and Vanguard's Dividend Appreciation ETF by 2.41%. The top 15 dividend growth stocks for July offer an average dividend yield of 1.66% and appear about 34% undervalued based on dividend yield theory. Since inception, September 2020, the watchlist is beating VIG by 4.20% and SPY by 3.81%.

title: Dollar General: A Long-term Compounder at a Fair Price
text: Dollar General ( DG , Financial), a prominent American discount retailer, has a vast presence with over 19,000 stores spread across 47 states. It offers a diverse range of branded and private-label products in various categories.

title: Dollar General Shares Plunge as Inflation Hits Customer Spending
text: Dollar General profit, sales miss estimates as inflation hits customer spending, sending shares lower.
